creator: nv_bsd@videotron.ca
text:
I agree that it's more appropriate to report this issue to drm developers.

But I considered the following:

In this link, although the gpu mentioned there is not the same, the issue is most likely the same:
https://github.com/freebsd/drm-kmod/issues/213

Which is cross-referenced to the following FreeBSD bug link:
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=267730

I opted to add a comment to the following, existing, open and over a year old:
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=260890

Thanks.
